purpose: A JavaFX-based space shooter game implementation with multiple levels, enemies, power-ups, and a scoring system. It includes features like player controls, collision detection, animations, sound effects, and a hall of fame.

parameters.name: c1X
parameters.description: The x-coordinate of the center of the first circle.

return_value.description: True if the circles intersect, false otherwise.

parameters.name: player
parameters.description: The player object to create an entry for.

return_value.description: An HBox containing the player's name and score.

parameters.name: audioClip
parameters.description: The audio clip to play.

methods.code: public boolean isReadyToStart() { return readyToStart; }

return_value.description: True if the game is ready to start, false otherwise.

methods.code: public boolean isRunning() { return running; }

return_value.description: True if the game is running, false otherwise.

methods.code: public boolean isHallOfFameScreen() { return hallOfFameScreen; }

return_value.description: True if the hall of fame screen is active, false otherwise.

methods.code: public void increaseSpaceShipVx() { spaceShip.vX = 5; }
public void decreaseSpaceShipVx() { spaceShip.vX = -5; }
public void stopSpaceShipVx() { spaceShip.vX = 0; }
public void increaseSpaceShipVy() { spaceShip.vY = 5; }
public void decreaseSpaceShipVy() { spaceShip.vY = -5; }
public void stopSpaceShipVy() { spaceShip.vY = 0; }
public InitialDigit getDigit1() { return digit1; }

return_value.description: The first digit for player initials.

methods.code: public InitialDigit getDigit2() { return digit2; }

return_value.description: The second digit for player initials.
